text.tspan: /stack-changes create a Split Plan for my 1,000-line PR

g.text: ## Split Plan
### Final goal
Add CSV/JSON export, filtering, sorting, budgets, and CLI wiring to Reports.
### Concerns currently mixed together
3 refactors (model, pipeline, formatter) + 5 features in one 1,019-line diff
### Proposed stack
| # | Title | Type | Depends on | Files | Test proof | Risk |
| 1 | refactor: typed Money/Txn model | refactor | — | money/txn.js | tests unchanged | low |
| 2 | refactor: query pipeline seam | refactor | #1 | query.js | tests unchanged | low |
| 3 | refactor: Formatter interface | refactor | #2 | formatter.js | tests unchanged | low |
| 4 | feat: add export formats | feature | #3 | formatters/* | format tests | low |
| 5 | feat: add filtering | feature | #4 | query.js | filter tests | low |
| 6 | feat: add sorting + grouping | feature | #5 | query.js | sort tests | low |
| 7 | feat: add budgets | feature | #6 | budgets.js | budget tests | low |
| 8 | feat: wire the CLI end-to-end | feature | #7 | index.js + | e2e CLI test | med |
### Parallelizable changes
Mostly stacked; #5 (filtering) and #6 (sorting) are independent of each other.
### Land order
bottom-up: #1 → #2 → … → #8 (refactors first)
### PR/diff/CL description template
Stack (land in order): #1 [1/8] … #8 [8/8] · Base: trunk · Depends on: prev
